ngos.name: Ackerschaft
ngos.description: A community farming collective promoting sustainable agriculture and local food production in Liechtenstein, connecting people to the land through shared cultivation projects.

ngos.name: aha – Tipps und Infos für junge Leute
ngos.description: Liechtenstein's youth information and advice centre, offering guidance, resources, and support on education, careers, volunteering, and civic participation for young people.

ngos.name: ASSITEJ Liechtenstein
ngos.description: The Liechtenstein member of the International Association of Theatre for Children and Young People, promoting performing arts for young audiences and supporting youth theatre projects.

ngos.name: CCF – Children Cancer Foundation
ngos.description: Supporting children with cancer and their families through research funding, practical assistance, and psychological care during and after treatment.

ngos.name: Cystische Fibrose Verein Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Supporting people living with cystic fibrosis and their families in Liechtenstein, providing advocacy, peer support, and access to the latest medical research and therapies.

ngos.name: Demenz Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Raising awareness about dementia, supporting affected individuals and caregivers, and advocating for a dementia-friendly society in Liechtenstein.

ngos.name: Eltern Kind Forum
ngos.description: A family support organisation offering early childhood education programmes, parenting guidance, and community spaces where parents and young children can learn and grow together.

ngos.name: Erwachsenenbildung Stein Egerta
ngos.description: Liechtenstein's leading adult education centre, offering continuing education, vocational training, and lifelong learning programmes across a broad range of disciplines.

ngos.name: Familienhilfe Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Providing practical in-home support and social care services to families and individuals in need across Liechtenstein, particularly those facing illness, crisis, or social hardship.

ngos.name: FamilienRaum
ngos.description: Creating inclusive family spaces and support networks in Liechtenstein, offering counselling, workshops, and community activities for families navigating everyday challenges.

ngos.name: Familienzentrum "müze"
ngos.description: A family centre in Liechtenstein offering a welcoming space for parents and children, with programmes focused on early development, social connection, and parenting support.

ngos.name: Fivetolife
ngos.description: Working to prevent suicide and support mental wellbeing in Liechtenstein, offering crisis intervention, awareness campaigns, and resources for those at risk.

ngos.name: Frauenhaus Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Providing emergency shelter, counselling, and support to women and children escaping domestic violence in Liechtenstein, empowering survivors towards safety and independence.

ngos.name: Haus Gutenberg
ngos.description: A centre for dialogue, education, and cultural exchange in Liechtenstein, hosting seminars, conferences, and educational events that bridge diverse communities and disciplines.

ngos.name: Hilfe für Bangladesch
ngos.description: Supporting sustainable development projects in Bangladesh through humanitarian aid, education funding, and community development initiatives led from Liechtenstein.

ngos.name: Hilfswerk Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Offering a broad spectrum of social services including childcare, family support, elderly care, and community integration programmes across Liechtenstein.

ngos.name: Hospizbewegung Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Training and coordinating volunteer hospice companions who provide comfort, dignity, and companionship to the dying and their families in Liechtenstein.

ngos.name: infra – Informations- und Beratungsstelle für Frauen
ngos.description: Liechtenstein's dedicated women's information and counselling centre, offering confidential support on issues including health, relationships, legal rights, and social welfare.

ngos.name: Integrity.Earth
ngos.description: An environmental organisation working to restore ecological integrity through conservation projects, sustainable land-use advocacy, and international biodiversity partnerships.

ngos.name: junges Theater Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Producing and presenting professional theatre for young audiences in Liechtenstein, fostering creativity, empathy, and cultural engagement among children and youth.

ngos.name: KIT – Kriseninterventionsteam Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Liechtenstein's volunteer crisis intervention team, providing immediate psychological first aid and support to individuals and communities in the aftermath of traumatic events.

ngos.name: Kulturverein TRIANGEL
ngos.description: A cultural association promoting contemporary arts and intercultural dialogue in Liechtenstein through exhibitions, events, and collaborative creative projects.

ngos.name: Kunstschule Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Liechtenstein's art school for all ages, offering courses in visual arts, crafts, and design that nurture creativity and artistic expression from early childhood through adulthood.

ngos.name: Leichtathletik Club Schaan – LCS
ngos.description: Promoting athletics and track-and-field sports for youth and adults in Liechtenstein, fostering health, teamwork, and sporting excellence through training and competitions.

ngos.name: Liechtensteiner Behindertenverband
ngos.description: The umbrella organisation for people with disabilities in Liechtenstein, advocating for inclusion, accessibility, and equal participation in all areas of social and public life.

ngos.name: Liechtensteiner Seniorenbund
ngos.description: Representing the interests of seniors in Liechtenstein, promoting active ageing, social participation, and quality of life for older residents through advocacy and programming.

ngos.name: Liechtensteinische Gesellschaft für Umweltschutz
ngos.description: Liechtenstein's leading environmental protection organisation, advocating for nature conservation, biodiversity, and sustainable development through education and policy engagement.

ngos.name: Liechtensteinische Musikschule
ngos.description: The national music school of Liechtenstein, offering instrumental tuition, ensemble programmes, and music education for children and adults across the principality.

ngos.name: Love.li
ngos.description: Promoting social inclusion and equal opportunities through education and integration programmes for migrants and marginalised communities in Liechtenstein.

ngos.name: Mali Kinderhilfe Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Supporting children's rights and education in Mali through school construction, teacher training, and community development projects funded from Liechtenstein.

ngos.name: MUS-E Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Bringing professional artists into primary schools in Liechtenstein to foster creativity, tolerance, and social cohesion through music, dance, theatre, and visual arts.

ngos.name: Netzwerk Familie
ngos.description: A network of family organisations in Liechtenstein collaborating to strengthen family life, advocate for family-friendly policies, and improve services for parents and children.

ngos.name: Ombudsstelle für Kinder und Jugendliche (OSKJ)
ngos.description: Liechtenstein's independent children's ombudsman office, advocating for the rights of children and young people and addressing complaints about institutions and public authorities.

ngos.name: Private Universität im Fürstentum Liechtenstein
ngos.description: A private university in Liechtenstein offering specialised degree programmes in health sciences, biosciences, and human medicine with a focus on applied research and innovation.

ngos.name: ROKJ Rheintal-Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Providing psychological and social support services for children and young people across the Rhine Valley region, including Liechtenstein, with specialist therapy and family counselling.

ngos.name: Sachwalterverein Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Supporting vulnerable adults who lack legal capacity in Liechtenstein, providing professional guardianship, financial administration, and advocacy for those unable to represent themselves.

ngos.name: Schwanger.li
ngos.description: Providing comprehensive information, counselling, and support for pregnant women and new parents in Liechtenstein, covering health, rights, and available social services.

ngos.name: Solargenossenschaft Liechtenstein
ngos.description: A cooperative promoting the deployment of solar energy in Liechtenstein, enabling residents and businesses to invest collectively in renewable energy infrastructure.

ngos.name: SOS-Kinderdorf (Liechtenstein) e.V.
ngos.description: The Liechtenstein chapter of SOS Children's Villages, supporting children who have lost parental care and families at risk through SOS villages, family strengthening programmes, and youth facilities.

ngos.name: Special Olympics Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Organising year-round sports training and competition for people with intellectual disabilities in Liechtenstein, promoting inclusion, health, and community through the power of sport.

ngos.name: Stiftung für soziale und psychische Gesundheit SPGe
ngos.description: Supporting people with mental health challenges in Liechtenstein through assisted living arrangements, social reintegration services, and community-based psychiatric support.

ngos.name: Stiftung LIACHT
ngos.description: A foundation dedicated to improving quality of life for people with chronic illness or disability in Liechtenstein through grants, care coordination, and social inclusion initiatives.

ngos.name: Stiftung Liachtbleck
ngos.description: Providing a ray of hope (Liachtbleck) for people in difficult life circumstances in Liechtenstein, supporting those facing poverty, illness, or social exclusion through targeted grants and practical help.

ngos.name: Stiftung Offene Jugendarbeit Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Funding and coordinating open youth work across Liechtenstein, supporting young people's development through non-formal education, peer support, and community engagement programmes.

ngos.name: Stiftung SOS-Kinderdorf SV
ngos.description: The foundation arm of SOS Children's Villages in Liechtenstein, providing long-term financial support for children without parental care and family strengthening programmes.

ngos.name: Stiftung TIEFSINN
ngos.description: Addressing the growing crisis in mental healthcare by securing psychiatric services, supporting therapy access for those in need, and destigmatising mental illness across the DACH region.

ngos.name: Streetwork Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Reaching out to marginalised and at-risk youth in Liechtenstein through mobile street-level social work, harm reduction, and low-threshold counselling services.

ngos.name: The Princely Liechtenstein Tattoo
ngos.description: Organising an international military music festival on the grounds of Vaduz Castle, celebrating Liechtenstein's cultural heritage and fostering international artistic exchange.

ngos.name: Turtle Foundation
ngos.description: One of seven national organisations globally dedicated to the protection of endangered sea turtles, operating conservation projects in Cape Verde and Indonesia with participatory community approaches.

ngos.name: UNICEF Schweiz und Liechtenstein
ngos.description: The Swiss and Liechtenstein national committee of UNICEF, advocating for children's rights globally and funding UNICEF programmes worldwide through fundraising and public awareness campaigns.

ngos.name: Universität Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Liechtenstein's national university, offering bachelor's, master's, and doctoral programmes in architecture, business, and entrepreneurship, with a strong focus on applied research and innovation.

ngos.name: Verein für humanitäre Hilfe
ngos.description: Providing emergency humanitarian assistance and longer-term development support in crisis regions worldwide, coordinated from Liechtenstein with a focus on dignity and self-reliance.

ngos.name: Verein für Männerfragen e.V.
ngos.description: Addressing men's health, wellbeing, and social challenges in Liechtenstein, offering counselling, peer support, and advocacy for a more holistic approach to male health and identity.

ngos.name: Verein für Menschenrechte
ngos.description: Monitoring and promoting human rights in Liechtenstein, providing legal education, supporting individuals whose rights have been violated, and engaging in international human rights networks.

ngos.name: Verein HerzGruppe
ngos.description: A heart patient support group in Liechtenstein, providing peer support, health education, and community for people who have experienced cardiac events and their families.

ngos.name: Verein Hindernislauf Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Organising obstacle course running events in Liechtenstein that combine sport, community spirit, and fundraising for charitable causes, making sport accessible and fun for all.

ngos.name: Verein Kindertagesstätten Liechtenstein
ngos.description: Operating and advocating for quality childcare and kindergarten provision in Liechtenstein, supporting working families and ensuring early childhood education meets the highest standards.
